text: I feel a sense of curiosity tinged with disquietude. The dim lighting and odd angles distort my perception, making the space feel unfamiliar and perhaps even a little alien. Yet, the bold "R+D" invites contemplation on innovation and human progress, transforming this quiet emptiness into a place of potential and latent activity. I am both unsettled and intrigued—my philosophical mind wonders about the nature of creation within such ambiguous, transitional spaces.
